name: PaymentDetailsAcss
description: Details of an ACSS payment method in Canada.

acceptedAt.description: The timestamp when the mandate was accepted.

lastFour.description: The last four digits of the ACSS account.

transitNumber.description: The transit number of the ACSS account.

institutionNumber.description: The institution number of the ACSS account.

mandateId.description: The mandate ID for the ACSS account.

intervalDescription.description: The description of the transaction interval.
